arts.ttl: Man Utd latest: Iraola reveals KEY difference between Amorim and Ten Hag
arts.sum: They play in a different way, different system, different approach to the game,” Iraola told reporters (as per Manchester Evening News ) during his pre-match press conference ahead of Bournemouth’s trip to Old Trafford on Sunday afternoon. Despite signing a contract extension after guiding the club to FA Cup glory in May, the aforementioned Ten Hag was sacked following Man Utd’s worst ever start to a Premier League season, in which they picked up just eight points from their opening seven matches.

arts.ttl: Manchester United weigh January loan for star player after last 48 hours development
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly exploring the possibility of loaning out Marcus Rashford during the January transfer window, according to The Sun. The report claims that the club is looking for a solution to an increasingly untenable situation, as tensions surrounding Rashford’s role under new manager Ruben Amorim threaten to create a toxic atmosphere within the […] The post Manchester United weigh January loan for star player after last 48 hours development appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Mason Mount 'devastated' after fresh injury setback as he sends message to Manchester United fans
arts.sum: Mount will be out for “several weeks” as injury nightmare continues

Following Man Utd’s defeat to Tottenham Hotspur in the Carabao Cup, Red Devils boss Ruben Amorim was asked if Mount should now be considered ‘injury prone’ following his horrid luck since moving to Old Trafford. Mason Mount has admitted he is “devastated” following his latest injury setback at Manchester United .

arts.ttl: Mason Mount breaks silence with message to Man United fans after latest injury setback - as former Chelsea team-mate Reece James offers support to he star
arts.sum: Mount saw a specialist on Wednesday after he went off with a muscle injury less than 15 minutes into United's win in the Manchester derby last weekend.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Dorgu 'Would Find it Hard to Turn Down' Man Utd Move in January
arts.sum: Manchester United have been given hope of winning the race to sign Lecce's Patrick Dorgu next month

arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Barcelona approach Man Utd over Marcus Rashford loan
arts.sum: FootballTransfers understands that Barcelona have made contact with Manchester United over a January loan move for Marcus Rashford . EXCLUSIVE: Barcelona approach Man Utd over Marcus Rashford loan

arts.ttl: Man Utd to RUIN Lamine Yamal's Barcelona dream
arts.sum: As a result, Williams is set to be the subject of an intense transfer pursuit next summer, with Man Utd and PSG both eager to sign him, according to El Nacional . Arsenal, Barcelona and Chelsea were all determined to land the Spain international this summer, following his immense performances at Euro 2024, however they were unable to convince the 22-year-old to leave San Mames.

arts.ttl: I have scouted Man United under Ruben Amorim - here's what has improved since Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Manchester United welcome AFC Bournemouth to Old Trafford on Sunday knowing they need a victory to keep up their momentum in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Ian Wright launches passionate defence of Marcus Rashford after Man Utd bombshell
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford's future at Manchester United is up in the air ahead of the January transfer window and Ian Wright has given his opinion on what the striker can still achieve
